data.content: Shipment review blocked: deployment issue. The prior implementation session left changes uncommitted in the main worktree working directory. git diff --stat shows 100 lines of changes across 4 files; 2 test files remain untracked. No commit exists on main for this beat. Shipment agent must: (1) commit all implementation changes to main, (2) push to origin/main, then shipment review can re-run.
